news.title: Metro Atlanta pastor demands answers in case of young Black man found dead on Mississippi beach
news.summary: At a church service Sunday, a prominent civil rights attorney addressed the death of a young man off the Mississippi coast.

news.title: Rapper arrested outside Georgia club where he was performing on homicide charges
news.summary: Authorities arrested a man late Saturday night in Lamar County on an outstanding Fulton County homicide warrant.

news.title: 2 teens charged in Old Fourth Ward shooting; victim's family seeks support
news.summary: Two teenagers face murder charges following a shooting that left one person dead and three others wounded in Atlanta on Friday afternoon, according to police.

news.title: Lil Toonk arrested on Fulton County homicide warrant
news.summary: A Georgia music artist was arrested Saturday night after deputies tracked him down on an outstanding Fulton County homicide warrant, according to officials.

news.title: 2 dead after domestic shooting at southeast Atlanta apartment
news.summary: Police are investigating after a man barricaded himself inside a southeast Atlanta apartment where a couple was found dead Sunday morning, according to authorities.

news.title: Suspect in July 4 Atlanta murder in custody, police say
news.summary: Police say a man is in custody and facing a murder charge from a July 4 incident in Atlanta.

news.title: Man arrested after body found underneath southwest Atlanta bridge
news.summary: Police arrested a 43-year-old man Sunday following the July 4 shooting death of a man found underneath a southwest Atlanta bridge.

news.title: Suspect caught after woman dies in Hambrick Road shooting
news.summary: A woman was shot and killed early Sunday morning on Hambrick Road in Stone Mountain, according to police.

news.title: DeKalb County police find woman dead, suspect injured after early morning shooting
news.summary: A woman was found dead from a gunshot wound in DeKalb County, and a suspect was detained nearby, police report. The investigation is ongoing.

news.title: Police investigating possible shooting at southeast Atlanta apartments
news.summary: The Atlanta Police Department is investigating a situation in southeast Atlanta.

news.title: Police expand Atlanta Beltline ‘Path Force’ patrols for walking trails, service call response
news.summary: The Atlanta Police Department announced it was adding more officers to its Atlanta Beltline-focused “Path Force” patrols.

news.title: Man hospitalized with multiple gunshot wounds in DeKalb County shooting
news.summary: Police in DeKalb County are investigating a late-night shooting that left one man hospitalized with multiple gunshot wounds, according to local reports.

news.title: DeKalb County shooting leaves one injured, police report
news.summary: A person is injured in a DeKalb County shooting, police report non-life-threatening injuries. Details are limited, with updates expected as the story develops.
